conversation.text: Our agent cannot receive calls on the CINNOX platform.
I'm sorry to hear that. I'll escalate this to our support team right away. To confirm — are you an existing CINNOX customer?
Yes, I'm an existing customer. Company is Pacific Bank HK.
Thank you. Could you please provide your Account ID so I can pass the details to our support team?
Got it. Which agent is experiencing the issue with call reception?
Thank you. What is the service number for that agent?

Thank you. I've noted your account details — Pacific Bank HK, Account PBHK-2024, Agent Alice, Service +852-1234-5678. Let me connect you with our support team who can access your account directly. Please hold for a moment.
Yes, please connect me to support.
Connecting you now. A support representative will be with you shortly.
